verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.172-178. 5 gaps found: v.8-9 (2 virtue/devotion claims), v.12 (begging condition), v.26 (Venus fortune), v.29 (wealth/conveyances). Backfill wrongly marked these as preamble/transitional.

claims.claim: 9th lord with strength in 9th -> fortunate and affluent
Jupiter in 9th + 9th lord in angle + ascendant lord strong -> extremely fortunate
9th lord strong + Venus in 9th + Jupiter in kendra -> father is fortunate and affluent
9th lord debilitated -> father is poor; Mars in 10th/12th -> patrimony lost through litigation
9th lord in deep exaltation + Venus in angle + Jupiter 9th from D9 ascendant -> father long-lived
9th lord in angle aspected by Jupiter -> father like a king with conveyances
9th lord in 10th + 10th lord aspected by benefic -> father very rich and famous
Sun in deep exaltation + 9th lord in 11th -> native virtuous, dear to king, devoted to father
claims.gap_note: Distinct condition (Sun exalted + 9th lord 11th) with distinct outcome (virtue + royal favor + filial devotion).

claims.claim: Sun in trine + 9th lord in 7th + Jupiter conjunction/aspect -> native devoted to father
claims.gap_note: Second devotion-to-father yoga with different conditions from v.8.

claims.claim: 9th lord in 2nd + 2nd lord in 9th -> fortune, conveyances and fame at age 32
Ascendant lord + 6th lord both in 9th -> mutual enmity with father
10th lord and 3rd lord both bereft of strength + 9th lord in fall or combustion -> native goes begging for food
claims.gap_note: Distinct from v.31 begging claim (which has Saturn+Moon+asc lord fall). Different conditions, same outcome.

claims.claim: Sun in 6/8/12 + 8th lord in 9th + 12th lord in ascendant -> father dies before native's birth
9th lord in debilitation Navamsa -> father's death at native's age 3 or 16
Ascendant lord in 2nd + 8th lord in 8th -> father's death at native's age 2 or 12
Rahu in 4th + Sun in 5th -> father's death at native's age 16 or 18
Saturn in 9th from 9th (=5th) + Moon with Sun and Rahu -> father's death at native's age 44
Moon in Sun's Navamsa -> father's death at native's age 35 or 41
Sun as 9th lord conjunct Mars and Saturn -> father's death at native's age 50
9th lord debilitated + dispositor in 9th -> father's death at native's age 26 or 30
Saturn in 7th from 8th (=2nd) -> father's death at native's age 6 or 25
Sun in 7th from Saturn (=8th) -> father's death at native's age 21-30
Sun in 8th + 8th lord in 9th -> father dies within 1 year of native's birth
claims.gap_note: Distinct from v.13 (BPHS2009) which requires 12th lord in asc. This only needs Sun in 8th + 8th lord in 9th.

claims.claim: 9th lord in 12th + 12th lord in 9th (exchange) -> father dies at native's age 44
claims.gap_note: Second condition for age 44 (distinct from BPHS2013 which has Saturn in 5th). 9th-12th exchange.

claims.claim: Venus in deep exaltation + company of 9th lord + Saturn in 3rd -> abundant fortunes
claims.gap_note: General fortune claim with specific conditions. No timing stated. Not encoded.

claims.claim: Jupiter in 9th + dispositor in kendra -> abundant fortunes after 20th year
Mercury exalted as 9th lord in 9th -> abundant fortunes after 36th year
9th lord in 9th + ascendant lord in ascendant + Jupiter in 7th -> gains of wealth and conveyances
claims.gap_note: Clear predictive claim with 3 conditions. Backfill wrongly marked as transitional.

claims.claim: Rahu in 9th + dispositor in 8th + 9th lord in fall -> devoid of fortunes
Saturn + Moon in 9th + ascendant lord in fall -> food by begging
Closing verse (no separate predictive content)
